pslr 1.0.2
  • Reference
    • Introduction to pslr
  • Changelog

Contributing

Source: CONTRIBUTING.md

Install dependencies:

Rscript -e 'pak::local_install_deps(dependencies = TRUE)'

Run verification:

Rscript -e 'lints <- lintr::lint_package(); if (length(lints)) { print(lints); quit(status = 1) }' && Rscript -e 'rcmdcheck::rcmdcheck(args = "--as-cran", error_on = "warning")'

Format R sources with Air (a fast, R-free formatter; config in air.toml):

air format .

Air runs automatically as a pre-commit hook, so you rarely need to invoke it by hand. Air owns layout; lintr (in the verify gate above) owns logic and best-practice lints. Don’t reformat code unrelated to your change.

Source lives in src/, behavior features live in features/, tests live in tests/, and durable project context lives in docs/.

Keep local-only planning state in _scratch/. Do not commit _scratch/, .fp/, secrets, dependency folders, build outputs, or generated caches.

Developed by Bart Turczynski.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0. Related: punycoder · rurl
